prevalence.source: Sarcopenia epidemiology syntheses + Indian aging cohort context
prevalence.trend: increasing with aging and chronic disease

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Low strength plus low muscle mass and function (EWGSOP/Asian working group criteria adaptations)

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: tens of millions of older adults
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; depends on nutrition and exercise support

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Limited access to DXA/BIA; functional assessment in clinics varies
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Resistance exercise, nutrition/protein support, vitamin D when deficient, manage comorbidities
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Malnutrition burden and limited structured rehab access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Community-based exercise and family support can improve function when mobilized
